description: Vibe Check is a tool that provides mentor-like feedback to AI Agents, preventing tunnel-vision, over-engineering and reasoning lock-in for complex and long-horizon agent workflows. KISS your over-eager AI Agents goodbye! Effective for: Coding, Ambiguous Tasks, High-Risk tasks

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-qwcr-r2fm-qrc7 in body-parser@1.20.2
findings.recommendation: Upgrade body-parser to a version that resolves GHSA-qwcr-r2fm-qrc7. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-qwcr-r2fm-qrc7 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
